title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Whirlpool India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Whirlpool India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
We at Whirlpool India are looking for an experienced Process Engineer based out of Howrah. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Whirlpool India:
Whirlpool India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in ERP Systems

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual performance appraisal
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Flexible working hours
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Howrah, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Whirlpool India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
